⚽ Football

FIFA World Cup 2026 Tickets

The 2026 FIFA World Cup will be jointly hosted by the United States, Canada, and Mexico, marking the first time three countries have co-hosted the tournament. With an expanded 48-team format, 104 matches will be played across 16 venues. Secure your tickets early for Group Stage clashes, knockout rounds, and the Grand Final.

48 events listed
Prices updated every 5 min
